introSection: Sky Loop (Japanese: スカイループ) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Ikoma Skyland in Ikoma, Nara, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The train engaged the Chain lift hill forwards, traversing the rest of the layout backwards.

fullText:
Sky Loop (Japanese: スカイループ) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Ikoma Skyland in Ikoma, Nara, Japan.

The train engaged the Chain lift hill forwards, traversing the rest of the layout backwards.

White track and supports.
